Interface AsyncApiSchema

All Superinterfaces:
AnySchemaUnion, BooleanSchemaUnion, Node, Schema, SchemaSchemaListUnion, Union, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AsyncApi20Schema, AsyncApi21Schema, AsyncApi22Schema, AsyncApi23Schema, AsyncApi24Schema, AsyncApi25Schema, AsyncApi26Schema, AsyncApi2xSchema, AsyncApi30Schema, AsyncApi31Schema, AsyncApi3xSchema
All Known Implementing Classes:
AsyncApi20SchemaImpl, AsyncApi21SchemaImpl, AsyncApi22SchemaImpl, AsyncApi23SchemaImpl, AsyncApi24SchemaImpl, AsyncApi25SchemaImpl, AsyncApi26SchemaImpl, AsyncApi30SchemaImpl, AsyncApi31SchemaImpl
public interface AsyncApiSchema extends Schema, AnySchemaUnion, SchemaSchemaListUnion
